name: Test file transfer connection
description: Validates transport reachability, authentication, and file access for all configured file specs. Returns per-stage results (transport, auth, files) with status: success/partial/failed.

validate_files.description: Whether to validate file specs exist and are readable (default: true)

preview_rows.description: Number of preview rows to return per file spec (default: 0)

input_schema.description: Uses connector instance config. Optional overrides for validation scope.
